task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS region from an S3 bucket URL like 's3://my-bucket.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/key'. The function should return just the region code (e.g., 'us-west-2').
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing a principal to perform 's3:GetObject' and 's3:PutObject' actions on all objects in the bucket 'my-application-bucket'.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs (format: 'i-' followed by 17 hexadecimal characters, e.g., 'i-0abcd1234efgh5678').
